setlist.info: Performance on German TV Show 'Wetten, Dass..?'
Soundcheck: "Hey Now!", "Rockin' Chair", "Digsy's Dinner", and "Take Me Away".
"The Turning", "The Shock of the Lightning", "Waiting for the Rapture", and "My Big Mouth" were all soundchecked before the show.
